fields.label: Provider
fields.help: Local model provider (required to enable local model scan).

fields.label: API Key Env
fields.help: Environment variable name containing provider API key.

fields.label: On Error
fields.help: Behavior when PII scanner fails: 'block' (fail-closed) or 'allow' (fail-open).

fields.label: Max Scan Chars
fields.help: Character cap for model-scan input (0 for unbounded).
